name: dzc-writer
description: AI solution generation plus local competitive programming test runner for VS Code.

commands.title: dzc Writer: Generate For Active File
dzc Writer: Show Detected Problem Comment

dzcWriter.model.description: OpenAI model used to generate code.

dzcWriter.apiKey.description: OpenAI API key. Prefer setting OPENAI_API_KEY in your environment instead.

dzcWriter.autoGenerate.description: When goal mode is on, automatically generate after detecting a changed leading document comment.

dzcWriter.confirmBeforeApply.description: Ask before appending generated content to the active editor.

dzcWriter.appendMode.description: How generated content is appended to the active editor. Use typewriter to append gradually.

dzcWriter.typewriterIntervalMs.description: Delay between typewriter append ticks, in milliseconds.

dzcWriter.typewriterCharsPerTick.description: Number of characters inserted on each typewriter append tick.

dzcWriter.showNotifications.description: Show non-error VS Code notification messages from this extension.

dzcWriter.debounceMs.description: Delay before reacting to active document changes while goal mode is on.

dzcWriter.maxInputChars.description: Maximum characters from the active file sent to the model.

dzcWriter.cppCompileCommand.description: Compile command for C++ files. Variables: ${file}, ${exe}.

dzcWriter.javaCompileCommand.description: Compile command for Java files. Variable: ${file}.
